name: Baked Macaroni with Chipped Beef
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Cook the macaroni in boiling water until tender, about 10 minutes.
3. Drain the macaroni and transfer it to a baking dish.
4. Mix in the chipped beef and any desired seasonings.
5. Pour the mixture into a greased baking dish and bake for 20-25 minutes or until heated through and bubbly.
6. Turn off the oven and let the dish cool for a few minutes before serving.
